jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Pepperfry
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pepperfry family as a SEO Specialist in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pepperfry:
Pepperfry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry!
